SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?team ?teamLabel WHERE {
  ?team wdt:P118 wd:Q48413 ; rdfs:label ?teamLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?teamLabel) = "en")
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?team wdt:P166 wd:Q190094 .
  }
}
```

args.answer: The baseball teams that have never won a World Series include the Seattle Mariners, Colorado Rockies, Tampa Bay Rays, San Diego Padres, Washington Nationals, Texas Rangers, Milwaukee Brewers, Houston Astros, Toronto Blue Jays, Minnesota Twins, and Arizona Diamondbacks.
